summary: Pattern Rendering Engine v4 testing completed successfully. V4 boundaries display correctly as blue lines on chart, TF selector shows proper timeframes (4H, 1D, 7D, 1M, 6M, 1Y), pattern card displays Ascending Triangle with bullish direction, and interpretation panel shows analysis text. Backend APIs working at 100% success rate.

connectivity_issues.impact: Real-time updates may be affected but core functionality works

Pattern card display (Ascending Triangle, bullish, confidence %)
Pattern overlay controls (Fib, Pattern, TA buttons)
Legacy pattern geometry disabled when V4 contract exists
